creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
are you sure you want to install a shell script in 
/usr/local/share/xombrero?

+    ${INSTALL_DATA}  ${WRKSRC}/playflash.sh ${PREFIX}/share/${PORTNAME}/

why are you installing this in ../share/applications?
+    ${INSTALL_DATA}  ${WRKSRC}/xombrero.desktop 
${PREFIX}/share/applications/

did you mean ../share/${PORTNAME}/ ?



-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
d: +1.561.948.2259
w: http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
